FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Aug-19-2013 Continued To Sep-16-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Armin Cooper for Western National Trust Company (Trustee).

Ms. Cooper informed the Court that the Beneficiary passed away in the fall, stated that he will submit a final accounting and that he will have it on file within the next three weeks. Status on filing of the final account was continued to September 16, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Loos. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #3, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Aug-22-2011 Granted Per Written Order

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Aug-09-2011 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of Receipts For The Funds Restored
Off Calendar Dec-21-2009 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #2, FEES
Off Calendar Nov-20-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Armon Cooper for Western National Trust Company.

The Court stated that there would probably be a reduction in fees, that there was authorization for .75% of the value of the assets, and that the Trustee and the Trust Advisor took a fee based on the value at the end of the month. Mr. Cooper stated that the order authorized both of them to pay themselves at that rate, that there should not be any question of the past payments but that there should be on the future payments. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.
